hooks.command: $s = git status --porcelain; if (-not $s) { exit 0 }; git add -A; $files = @(git diff --staged --name-only); if ($files.Count -eq 0) { exit 0 }; $n = $files.Count; $f = $files[0]; $leaf = [IO.Path]::GetFileNameWithoutExtension($f); $dir = [IO.Path]::GetFileName([IO.Path]::GetDirectoryName($f)); $scope = if ($dir) { '(' + $dir + ')' } else { '' }; $subject = if ($n -eq 1) { $leaf } else { ($n.ToString() + ' files') }; git commit -m ('chore' + $scope + ': update ' + $subject)
